lines.gurmukhi: ਇਨ ਬਿਧਿ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਹਰਿਆ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: ein bidh ihu man hariaa hoe |
lines.english: In this way, this mind is rejuvenated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਕਢੈ ਧੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam japai din raatee guramukh haumai kadtai dhoe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, day and night, egotism is removed and washed away from the Gurmukhs. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਲ ਫੂਲ ਲਾਗੇ ਜਾਂ ਆਪੇ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: fal fool laage jaan aape laae |
lines.english: The mortal blossoms forth in flower and fruit, when the Lord Himself so wills.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਹਰਿਆ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: eihu jag hariaa satigur bhaae |2|
lines.english: This world blossoms forth in its greenery, through the love of the True Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਣਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: satigur baanee sabad sunaae |
lines.english: The True Guru speaks the Bani of the Word, and the Shabad, the Word of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਬਸੰਤੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਸਭੁ ਵਾੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: aap basant jagat sabh vaarree |
lines.english: The Lord Himself is the season of spring; the whole world is His Garden.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਲਿ ਲਗੈ ਤਾਂ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mool lagai taan satigur paae |3|
lines.english: He is attached to the Lord, the Primal Root of all, when he finds the True Guru. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਨਿਰਾਲੀ ॥੪॥੫॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: naanak poorai bhaag bhagat niraalee |4|5|17|
lines.english: O Nanak, this most unique devotional worship comes only by perfect destiny. ||4||5||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸੰਤੁ ਹਿੰਡੋਲ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: basant hinddol mahalaa 3 ghar 2 |
lines.english: Basant Hindol, Third Mehl, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਸਦ ਅਪਣਾ ਭਾਈ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur saalaahee sad apanaa bhaaee gur charanee chit laaee |1|
lines.english: I praise my Guru forever, O Siblings of Destiny. I focus my consciousness on the Guru's Feet. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਵਾਰਿਆ ਭਾਈ ਗੁਰਸਬਦ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee baanee vittahu vaariaa bhaaee gurasabad vittahu bal jaaee |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to the Word of the Guru's Bani, O Siblings of Destiny. I am devoted and dedicated to the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਹਰਿਆ ਹੋਵੈ ਇਕੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man tan teraa hariaa hovai ik har naamaa fal paae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Your mind and body shall blossom forth in lush greenery, and you shall obtain the fruit of the Name of the One Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere man raam naam chit laae |
lines.english: O my mind, focus your consciousness on the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਚਹੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਉਠਿ ਗਇਆ ਭਾਈ ਸੁਖੁ ਵੁਠਾ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: vichahu haumai dukh utth geaa bhaaee sukh vutthaa man aae |2|
lines.english: The pain of egotism within is eradicated and banished, O Siblings of Destiny, and peace comes to dwell in their minds. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਸੇ ਉਬਰੇ ਭਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur raakhe se ubare bhaaee har ras amrit peeae |
lines.english: Those who are protected by the Guru are saved, O Siblings of Destiny. They drink in the Ambrosial Nectar of the Lord's sublime essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਜਿਨੑਾ ਨੋ ਬਖਸਿਓਨੁ ਭਾਈ ਸਬਦੇ ਲਇਅਨੁ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dhur aape jinaa no bakhasion bhaaee sabade leian milaae |
lines.english: Those whom the Primal Lord Himself forgives, O Siblings of Destiny, are united with the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਏ ਕਰੇ ਆਪਿ ਭਾਈ ਜਿਨਿ ਹਰਿਆ ਕੀਆ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aap karaae kare aap bhaaee jin hariaa keea sabh koe |
lines.english: He Himself does, and causes all to be done, O Siblings of Destiny; He makes everything blossom forth in green abundance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੂੜਿ ਤਿਨੑਾ ਕੀ ਅਘੁਲੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dhoorr tinaa kee aghuleeai bhaaee satasangat mel milaae |3|
lines.english: The dust of their feet brings emancipation; in the company of Sadh Sangat, the True Congregation, we are united with the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਦ ਵਸੈ ਭਾਈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥੧॥੧੮॥੧੨॥੧੮॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: naanak man tan sukh sad vasai bhaaee sabad milaavaa hoe |4|1|18|12|18|30|
lines.english: O Nanak, peace fills their minds and bodies forever, O Siblings of Destiny; they are united with the Shabad. ||4||1||18||12||18||30||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਬਸੰਤੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਘਰੁ ੧ ਇਕਤੁਕੇ ॥
lines.translit: raag basant mahalaa 4 ghar 1 ikatuke |
lines.english: Raag Basant, Fourth Mehl, First House, Ik-Thukay:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਉ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਰਮਈਆ ਓਤਿ ਪੋਤਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tiau ghatt ghatt rameea ot pot |1|
lines.english: the Lord permeates each and every heart, through and through. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਪਸਰੀ ਸੂਰਜ ਕਿਰਣਿ ਜੋਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: jiau pasaree sooraj kiran jot |
lines.english: Just as the light of the sun's rays spread out,

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਹਰਿ ਰਵਿਆ ਸ੍ਰਬ ਥਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eko har raviaa srab thaae |
lines.english: The One Lord is permeating and pervading all places.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਏਕੋ ਹਰਿ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt antar eko har soe |
lines.english: The One Lord is deep within each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਇਕੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur miliai ik pragatt hoe |2|
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, the One Lord becomes manifest, radiating forth. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਮਿਲੀਐ ਮੇਰੀ ਮਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee mileeai meree maae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, we merge with Him, O my mother. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਨਰ ਲੋਭੀ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਦੂਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: saakat nar lobhee jaaneh door |3|
lines.english: The greedy, faithless cynic thinks that God is far away. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਏਕੁ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: eko ek rahiaa bharapoor |
lines.english: The One and Only Lord is present and prevailing everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਏਕੁ ਵਰਤੈ ਹਰਿ ਲੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: eko ek varatai har loe |
lines.english: The One and Only Lord permeates and pervades the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸੰਤੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: basant mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Basant, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੈਣਿ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਦੁਇ ਸਦੇ ਪਏ ॥
lines.translit: rain dinas due sade pe |
lines.english: Day and night, the two calls are sent out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਏਕੋੁ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak har eko kare su hoe |4|1|
lines.english: O Nanak, whatever the One Lord does comes to pass. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਹੁ ਅੰਤਿ ਸਦਾ ਰਖਿ ਲਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: man har simarahu ant sadaa rakh le |1|
lines.english: O mortal, meditate in remembrance on the Lord, who protects you forever, and saves you in the end. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਆਲਸੁ ਦੂਖ ਭੰਜਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਗੁਣ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sabh aalas dookh bhanj prabh paaeaa guramat gaavahu gun prabh kere |1| rahaau |
lines.english: God the Destroyer of all depression and suffering is found, through the Guru's Teachings, singing the Glorious Praises of God. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਚੇਤਿ ਸਦਾ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har har chet sadaa man mere |
lines.english: Concentrate forever on the Lord, Har, Har, O my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਮੁਏ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh fir fir haumai mue |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs die of their egotism, over and over again.
